You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-8] A silver oval dish filled with seasoned rice, kidney beans, and potato chunks rests on a white surface. To the left, the text "METHI PULAO" appears in a rough, dark green font. The composition remains static, showcasing the prepared meal. [8-10] The camera angle shifts to center the dish at the bottom. The green text vanishes, replaced by white lettering spelling "METHI PULAO" appearing directly above and over the food against the plain white background. [10-12] The scene transitions to a kitchen stovetop featuring a stainless steel pressure cooker. To the right, a green mat holds glass bowls containing chopped red onions, tomatoes, potatoes, green herbs, and spices. White text "OIL - 2 TBSP" appears in the bottom left corner as oil is poured into the pot. [12-14] The white text overlay updates to read "FENNEL SEEDS - 1 TSP, WHOLE". A hand enters the frame from the right, reaching toward the small glass bowls of spices arranged on the green mat next to the cooker.

[14-16] A hand lifts a small glass bowl containing fennel seeds and whole garam masala from the green cutting board and pours the spices into the stainless steel pressure cooker sitting on the stovetop, identified by the text overlay "FENNEL SEEDS - 1 TSP, WHOLE GARAM MASALA". [16-18] The hand reaches for a small glass bowl containing white cashews situated on the green mat next to the stove, causing the text overlay to update to "CASHEWS". [18-22] The cashews are poured into the stainless steel pressure cooker containing hot oil and spices. A wooden spatula with a green silicone tip stirs the cashews and spices together at the bottom of the pot, tossing the white cashews around to mix thoroughly with the fennel seeds and whole garam masala already present in the oil.

Between 24s and 30s, chopped red onions and white cashews sit inside a stainless steel pressure cooker, being sautéed in oil. A hand utilizes a wooden spatula with a green tip to continuously stir the mixture, blending the purple onions with the nuts and spices at the bottom of the pot. To the right of the stove, a green mat supports stationary glass bowls filled with diced tomatoes, potatoes, green herbs, and spices. At 30s, the stirring action ceases. A hand holds a small white square dish containing yellow turmeric powder over the cooker. White text appears in the bottom left corner reading "TURMERIC - 1 TSP", which updates to "TURMERIC - 1 TSP , SALT" in the final frame as the spices are poised to be added to the cooking onion and cashew base.

recent_thinks: [22-24] A hand lifts a glass bowl of chopped red onions from the green mat and pours them into the stainless steel pressure cooker with the cashews. As the onions fall into the hot oil, white text overlay appears in the bottom left corner reading "ONIONS - 1 LARGE".

[32-34] A hand pours yellow turmeric powder and white salt from a small white square dish into the pressure cooker containing sautéed onions and cashews. The text overlay in the bottom left corner changes to display "TURMERIC - 1 TSP , SALT" as the ingredients are added to the pot.

[34-36] A hand pours white salt from a small square dish into the pressure cooker containing onions and cashews. The text overlay reads "TURMERIC - 1 TSP , SALT". Subsequently, a wooden spatula with a green tip stirs the mixture, blending the spices and vegetables in the oil at the bottom of the steel pot.

[36-38] A hand pours white salt from a square dish into the pot, joining the onions and cashews. Subsequently, a wooden spatula with a green tip stirs the mixture, blending the red onions, white nuts, and yellow spices within the stainless steel pressure cooker on the stovetop.

The green text vanishes, replaced by white lettering spelling "METHI PULAO" appearing directly above and over the food against the plain white background. [10-12] The scene transitions to a kitchen stovetop featuring a stainless steel pressure cooker. To the right, a green mat holds glass bowls containing chopped red onions, tomatoes, potatoes, green herbs, and spices. A hand enters the frame from the right, reaching toward the small glass bowls of spices arranged on the green mat next to the cooker.

recent_thinks: [14-16] A hand lifts a small glass bowl containing fennel seeds and whole garam masala from the green cutting board. [16-18] The hand reaches for a small glass bowl containing white cashews situated on the green mat next to the stove. As the bowl is lifted near the stainless steel pressure cooker, the white text overlay at the bottom left updates to display the label 'CASHEWS'.

The green text vanishes, replaced by white lettering spelling "METHI PULAO" appearing directly above and over the food against the plain white background. [10-12] The scene transitions to a kitchen stovetop featuring a stainless steel pressure cooker. To the right, a green mat holds glass bowls containing chopped red onions, tomatoes, potatoes, green herbs, and spices. White text "OIL - 2 TBSP" appears in the bottom left corner as oil is poured into the pot. [12-14] The white text overlay updates to read "FENNEL SEEDS - 1 TSP, WHOLE". A hand enters the frame from the right, reaching toward the small glass bowls of spices arranged on the green mat next to the cooker. [14-16] A hand lifts a small glass bowl containing fennel seeds and whole garam masala from the green cutting board and pours the spices into the stainless steel pressure cooker sitting on the

From [36-38], a hand pours white salt from a small square dish into a stainless steel pressure cooker already containing chopped red onions and cashews. Immediately after, a wooden spatula with a green silicone tip begins stirring the mixture, blending the red onions, white nuts, and yellow spices as they sauté in oil on the stovetop. Throughout the remainder of the clip [38-44], the hand continuously stirs these ingredients inside the pot to ensure even cooking. To the right of the stove, a green cutting mat holds several stationary prep bowls: a large bowl of chopped green herbs, a glass bowl of diced red tomatoes, a white ramekin of cubed potatoes, a small glass bowl of beige paste, and a square dish containing orange spice powder.

[44-46] A hand stirs a mixture of sautéing onions and cashews with a green-tipped spatula inside a steel pot on a stove. White text reading "GINGER GARLIC PASTE - 1" is visible at the bottom left. On a green mat to the right, a hand reaches toward a small glass bowl containing a beige paste.
[46-50] The text overlay updates to "GINGER GARLIC PASTE - 1 1/2 TBSP". The hand lifts the small glass bowl from the mat and positions it over the stainless steel pressure cooker. The hand tips the bowl to deposit the beige ginger garlic paste into the pot, where it lands on top of the sautéed red onions, cashews, and spices.
[50-52] Following the addition, the hand uses the wooden spatula with a green tip to stir the contents. The spatula mixes the new paste into the oil and onion base at the bottom of the pot. Several other bowls containing chopped ingredients, including tomatoes and greens, remain on the green mat to the right of the stove.

[52-58] A hand uses a wooden spatula with a green tip to stir the contents of a stainless steel pressure cooker on a stove. The beige ginger-garlic paste is mixed into sautéed red onions and cashews, blending with oil and spices. To the right, white bowls containing chopped potatoes and herbs, along with a glass bowl of tomatoes, sit on a green cutting mat. [58-60] White text "TOMATO - 1 MEDIUM" appears as a hand lifts the glass bowl of chopped red tomatoes. The tomatoes are poured into the cooker, and the spatula stirs the red chunks into the sautéing onion and cashew mixture.

[60-64] A hand pours chopped red tomatoes from a clear glass bowl into a stainless steel pressure cooker containing a sautéed onion and cashew mixture. A wooden spatula with a green silicone tip stirs the red chunks into the base. The hand then moves right to a green cutting mat, reaching for a small white ramekin filled with cubed potatoes.
[64-68] The hand lifts the ramekin and pours the white potato chunks into the cooker. White text "POTATO - 1 LARGE" appears in the bottom left. As the potatoes settle on the tomato mixture, the text updates to "METHI LEAVES - 1 BUNCH" while the hand reaches for a white bowl containing chopped green herbs on the mat.

[74-76] Stirring stops, showing mixed potatoes, tomatoes, and greens. White text reading "CORIANDER POW - 1 TBSP , RED CHILI POW - 1 TBSP" overlays the bottom. A hand positions a small white square dish holding orange and beige spice powders above the steel pressure cooker.
